option.name: originalContent

option.value: { "mods": [ { "id": "fbw", "name": "FlyByWire A32NX", "description": "Modification gratuite de l'A320 par défaut avec systèmes réalistes.", "author": "FlyByWire Simulations", "version": "v0.12.3", "downloadUrl": "https://flybywirecdn.com/installer/release/FlyByWire_Installer_Setup.exe", "category": "Aircraft", "type": "ExternalInstaller", "installMode": "Assisted", "sizeBytes": 780000000, "isChecked": false, "tags": ["airliner", "a320", "freeware"] } ] }
